requirement_topic.en: ELES/Agen-E Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 斯洛文尼亚ELES/Agen-E并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 斯洛維尼亞ELES/Agen-E併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Slovenia should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to ELES (transmission system operator) technical review and Agencija za energijo (Agen-E) energy-sector oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Slovenia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Slovenia uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Slovenia is 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase (EU standard), while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Slovenian-language documentation is commonly expected by ELES and project owners.
summary.zh: 斯洛文尼亚并网太阳能光伏逆变器应作为项目级并网设备处理，接受ELES（输电系统运营商）技术审查及Agencija za energijo（Agen-E）能源监管。实际IEC证据包通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口合规，并须针对斯洛文尼亚230/400 V、50 Hz低压电网验证固件保护阈值、重连延迟、电压窗口和频率窗口。斯洛文尼亚与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：斯洛文尼亚为单相230 V、三相400 V（欧盟标准），而中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。ELES和项目业主通常期望提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。
summary.zht: 斯洛維尼亞併網太陽能光伏逆變器應作為項目級併網設備處理，接受ELES（輸電系統運營商）技術審查及Agencija za energijo（Agen-E）能源監管。實際IEC證據包通常包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面合規，並須針對斯洛維尼亞230/400 V、50 Hz低壓電網驗證韌體保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓窗口和頻率窗口。斯洛維尼亞與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：斯洛維尼亞為單相230 V、三相400 V（歐盟標準），而中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。ELES和項目業主通常期望提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
ELES project grid-connection and commissioning requirements for the relevant installation
Agen-E electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Slovenia low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Slovenia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to ELES acceptance or Agen-E project review in Slovenia.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件以中国电网条件和国内验收流程为基础。中国低压基准为50 Hz、220/380 V，而非斯洛文尼亚50 Hz、230/400 V。中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能自动转移为ELES认可或Agen-E项目审查证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件以中國電網條件和國內驗收流程為基礎。中國低壓基準為50 Hz、220/380 V，而非斯洛維尼亞50 Hz、230/400 V。中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能自動轉移為ELES認可或Agen-E項目審查證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Slovenia ELES/Agen-E project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Slovenia-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Slovenia voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. Documentation should be available in Slovenian as commonly required by local authorities and project owners.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据不能替代斯洛文尼亚ELES/Agen-E项目验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、斯洛文尼亚专用设置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz调试记录。不得称斯洛文尼亚电压与中国相同：仅50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V。文件通常须提供斯洛文尼亚语版本，以满足当地主管机构和项目业主要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據不能替代斯洛維尼亞ELES/Agen-E項目驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、斯洛維尼亞專用設置文件以及230/400 V、50 Hz調試記錄。不得稱斯洛維尼亞電壓與中國相同：僅50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V。文件通常須提供斯洛維尼亞語版本，以滿足當地主管機構和項目業主要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through ELES technical review and Agen-E project approval or oversight
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not an ELES or Agen-E Slovenia approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Slovenian ELES/Agen-E grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Slovenia's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, and provide documentation in Slovenian where required. Verify current ELES and Agen-E project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足斯洛文尼亚ELES/Agen-E并网审查。请准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，将逆变器固件重新参数化为斯洛文尼亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网，并在必要时提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。出货或调试前请直接核实现行ELES和Agen-E项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足斯洛維尼亞ELES/Agen-E併網審查。請準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，將逆變器韌體重新參數化為斯洛維尼亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網，並在必要時提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。出貨或調試前請直接核實現行ELES和Agen-E項目要求。
